arts.ttl: Man United players have 'huge belief' in Andre Onana despite his latest blunder, claims Bruno Fernandes... after he backed up Nottingham Forest howler by gifting Viktoria Plzen a goal
arts.sum: This time, away to Viktoria Plzen, Man United No 1 Andre Onana completely miscalculated a pass out from the back to Matthjis de Ligt, allowing the Czech side to nip in and tap into an empty net.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund spares Andre Onana blushes as Man Utd beat Viktoria Plzen - 6 talking points
arts.sum: VIKTORIA PLZEN 1-2 MAN UTD: The Red Devils were forced to come from behind in Czechia after a shocking mistake from goalkeeper Andre Onana gifted the hosts the lead in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen 1-2 Manchester United PLAYER RATINGS: Which Red Devils star had Ruben Amorim fuming? Who came up big in the final moments? And how did Andre Onana fare?
arts.sum: Manchester United had Rasmus Hojlund to thank after the £72million striker came off the bench to spare their blushes on a difficult night away to Viktoria Plzen. Here is how their players rated.

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen 1-2 Man United: Rasmus Hojlund rescues Red Devils with second-half brace - after hosts took the lead through Andre Onana howler
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER AT THE DOOSAN ARENA: Ruben Amorim 's side travelled to the Czech Republic in search of a win after suffering defeat to Arsenal and Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: ‘One of the Best’ Managers Rejects Wolves Like Potter, Wants West Ham
arts.sum: Former Juventus boss Massimiliano Allegri is not interested in taking charge of Wolverhampton Wanderers.
